news-global-econ.title: Jeremiyah Love signs rookie deal that gives him most guaranteed money by running back before taking NFL snap
news-global-econ.description: Jeremiyah Love officially signed his $53 million rookie deal with the Arizona Cardinals, setting the record for guaranteed money for an NFL running back.

news-global-econ.title: American women have been lied to about motherhood and it’s time to fix it
news-global-econ.description: Most women seeking abortions aren't certain they want one, according to Human Coalition. They need solutions to barriers like housing and childcare.

news-global-econ.description:

news-global-soc.description:
President Trump’s ATF released a draft of its revised Form 4473 yesterday and an immediate change between it and the Biden-era form is the absence of a “non-binary” option when choosing sex. Form 4473 is the Firearms Transaction Record used

news-global-soc.title: Inside the US military playbook to cripple Iran if nuclear talks collapse
news-global-soc.description: Deep mistrust between the U.S. and Iran leaves nuclear talks fragile, with analysts warning of a phased military campaign if diplomacy fails entirely.

news-global-soc.title: Fitness expert visits gyms nationwide, shouts out 4 clubs for 'getting it right’
news-global-soc.description: New York City-based fitness expert Kenny Santucci reveals his favorite gyms across the U.S., and explains what makes a great workout space beyond bells and whistles.
